name: Didomi Consent Management Platform API
what_it_does: Consent management platform (CMP) with REST API — enabling organizations to collect, store, and honor user consent for cookies, data processing, and marketing communications across web, mobile, and connected TV, with GDPR, CCPA, and TCF2 compliance, preference center management, and API-driven consent data integration.
use_cases: Collecting and storing user consent for cookies and data processing via Didomi SDK
Querying user consent status via Didomi API for downstream data processing decisions
Integrating consent data with CRM and marketing platforms for consent-aware activation
Managing preference centers and user data rights requests via Didomi Admin API
Automating consent reporting and audit trail generation for GDPR compliance
not_for: Full GDPR compliance without additional DPA and process implementation
Data breach notification and incident response (use dedicated DPM tools)
Privacy-by-design architecture consulting (Didomi provides tooling, not services)
best_when: A European business or any company processing EU/California consumer data needs a sophisticated CMP with strong TCF2 support, API-driven consent integration, and enterprise-grade preference management.
avoid_when: You're a small website with simple cookie consent needs (use free tools like Cookiebot), operate entirely outside GDPR/CCPA jurisdictions, or don't need API-level consent integration.

auth.notes: API key from Didomi console. OAuth2 for enterprise SSO. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for consent change events (opt-in, opt-out). SDK for web (JavaScript), iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter. TCF2 vendor list management via IAB TCF infrastructure. Consent data stored per user UUID. Scoped by resource (consents, notices, reporting).

pricing.notes: French company (Paris). Founded 2017. Raised $40M Series B (2022). Backed by Breega, Bpifrance. TCF2 certified (IAB Europe). 100,000+ websites using Didomi. Strong in France, Belgium, Spain, Germany. Preference Center for complex multi-purpose consent management. API-first design allows deep integration. GDPR Data Subject Rights (DSR) management. Compliance with ePrivacy Directive, CCPA, LGPD (Brazil), PDPA (Thailand).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for consent data, notices, regulations, and reporting. API key and OAuth2 auth. Excellent developer documentation. SDK available for all major platforms. Webhook for real-time consent change events. TCF2 vendor list automatically maintained. Consent data queryable per user UUID. DSR request management via admin API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Consent reads fully idempotent. Notice reads idempotent. Reporting reads idempotent by period. DSR queries idempotent by request ID.
known_agent_gotchas: TCF2 requires IAB-registered vendor status — cannot add arbitrary vendors to consent notice
Consent is per user UUID — UUID persistence depends on browser storage (affected by ITP on Safari)
ePrivacy Directive: cookies must be blocked until explicit consent — SDK handles this automatically
LGPD and PDPA compliance available but requires region-specific notice configuration
Consent data is the legal record — ensure webhook events are acknowledged and stored durably

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, TCF2, ePrivacy compliant. EU data residency (France). API key and OAuth2 auth. French company with GDPR-first architecture. Consent data is legal record — must be stored durably with audit trail. User UUID must be protected as PII. DSR handling requires secure data subject verification. TCF2 consent signals are legally binding — store with cryptographic integrity.
